title: Ramona stachyoides
taxonomy: Ramona stachyoides is classified in the family Lamiaceae. It belongs to the genus Ramona, which is a group of flowering plants. The species Ramona stachyoides is native to California in the United States, where it grows in dry, open areas. The classification of Ramona stachyoides is also supported by its botanical characteristics, such as its small, tubular flowers and hairy leaves. Further research on the plant's classification would provide more detailed information on its taxonomic relationships.
